Vulnerabilities.Title: X.400 address type confusion in X.509 GeneralName
Vulnerabilities.Description: There is a type confusion vulnerability relating to X.400 address processing inside an X.509 GeneralName, allowing remote attackers to crash the service or potentially read memory contents.

Vulnerabilities.Title: zlib: heap-based buffer over-read in inflate via large gzip header
Vulnerabilities.Description: zlib through 1.2.12 has a heap-based buffer over-read in inflate in inflate.c via a large gzip header extra field.

Vulnerabilities.Title: openssl: Excessive time spent in DH key/parameter generation
Vulnerabilities.Description: Generating excessively long X9.42 DH keys may be very slow.
